title: Nebulis Entity
description:
A mysterious race of aliens known as the Drakkith has been causing the Astral Research Coalition (ARC) a lot of trouble in a newly discovered sector of space. You have been deployed to investigate and record anything of interest you may find.

CREW THE SHIP. KEEP IT FLYING!Nebulis Entity is a first-person spaceship crew simulator, built around the chaos of keeping a space ship operating while dealing with whatever the universe decides to throw at you. Below are some of the things you'll end up doing while aboard:

• Manage your crew and assign tasks to your robotic assistants

• Repair and maintain life support, electrical systems, and other critical systems

• Fight fires (literally!)

• Read emails, process signals, and keep yourself sane by eating food from vending machines

• Send important information back to the ARC through the cannon data network!

• And more!

CUSTOMIZE YOUR CHARACTER

FEATURES• Online co-op with built in proximity chat

• Coordinate with your crew and robotic assistants to keep the ship from meeting a deadly fate

• A set of systems to maintain to keep your ship in good condition

• Customizing your characters with cosmetics

• Steam achievements, Steam cloud support

• Exploring a galaxy with different types of sectors and vessels (friend and foe!)

• Improved controller support soon

HAIL TRADERS AND TRADE GOODS

UPDATES AND FEEDBACKNebulis Entity will receive content updates adding more signals, events, and entities to encounter. Feedback from users is appreciated and welcome.

SCAN DOWN SIGNALS, REFINE, AND VIEW THEM

PLAY WITH FRIENDS, OR SOLOThe ARC has spent years working on flying robotic assistants to help maintain your vessel, which can be a big help if you aren't able to find willing crew members to venture alongside you! You can still leverage them even while playing with your friends.

Your Steam friends can join games in progress directly through their friend list, or by having you invite them to your game. 

Nebulis Entity has been tested and performs well with up to 6 other players, but you may increase the limit when you host a game beyond that.
description_short: Nebulis Entity is a first person spaceship crew simulator, with support for online co-op. Maintain your vessel, track down and decode alien signals, and venture as far as you can - while doing your best to prevent your ship from falling apart around you.
